metadata.description: Obsidian Operator — an AI-native personal operating system for Obsidian, with a core daily concierge and optional intelligence/content modules

plugins.name: obsidian-operator
plugins.description: All 20 Operator skills (19 production + 1 cross-platform reference) — daily concierge, weekly planning, strategic reviews, meetings, projects, deep research, and optional intelligence/content modules. Supports Claude Code and Codex CLI.
